title: Emperor's Advisory Committee on Military Affairs
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Emperor's advisory committee}}
The '''Emperor's Advisory Committee on Military Affairs''' advised [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] regarding [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] affairs around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

At some point, they received a report from senior officers of the [[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]] relating to then-recently implemented custom ordnance for the Imperial Military, including [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking fields]], [[hyperspace pulsemass generator]]s, [[magnetic bombard]]s, [[orbital nightcloak]]s, [[visual electromagnetic intensifier]]s, and [[two-wave gravshock]] devices, as well as detailed descriptions of each. A copy of this report was later procured by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]], the [[Executive Secretary]] and [[Master Historian]] of [[Alliance High Command/Legends|the high command]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and submitted alongside other copied Imperial reports in a single report to the High Command, including Alliance Supreme Commander [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].
